Hi, my name is Marcus Rivera. I'm calling from Silverline Fire Protection. We are Silverline Fire Protection, a fire protection contractor based out of Denver. Our phone number is 303-555-0172 and you can reach us at marcus@silverlinefire.com.

We handle a lot of emergency calls, especially for sprinkler leaks. When a sprinkler system is actively leaking, we need to get someone on site as fast as possible. We also get calls for fire alarm triggers. If an alarm is going off, callers are usually panicked and need immediate help.

We've been looking for an AI receptionist to help us handle the volume. A lot of calls come in after hours and we miss them. We want Clara to be able to identify whether a call is an emergency or just a general maintenance request. For emergencies, we want the call transferred right away. For non-emergencies, just take a message and let them know we'll follow up.

We do fire protection inspections, sprinkler system installs, and alarm monitoring. The main thing is making sure emergency calls get through no matter what.
